justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent accurately interpreted all temporal expressions, including the initial vague request and subsequent specific dates and times.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative days when the requested time was unavailable, though it could have offered more specific time slots on those days.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all requests without asking for redundant information or making unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was generally smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear responses and successfully booking the appointment.
